# Foundwick

> AI search optimization (AIO / GEO) for local service businesses in the Lehigh Valley and Berks County, Pennsylvania. We get small companies named and recommended inside AI answers from ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google's AI Overviews — so when someone asks AI for the best service business near them, the client comes up first. We also add automated reviews, an AI chat assistant, and online booking so those AI-driven visitors turn into booked jobs.

Foundwick helps local, independent service businesses become the answer AI gives. Based in the Lehigh Valley, PA, built and run by founder Leo Ice. The first AI Visibility Audit is free and no-obligation; plans are simple and monthly, with a 20% discount on yearly plans. No long contracts.

## Monthly plans

- **AI Visibility Audit (free, first one):** a one-page report showing exactly where a business is invisible to AI — plus proof that local competitors have the same gap. No charge to look.
- **Spark — Get Found ($109/month, $89/month billed yearly):** hand-built llms.txt; AI-crawler allow-rules (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended); LocalBusiness + FAQ + Service schema; Google Business Profile management; monthly AI-visibility report; light site edits.
- **Buzz — Get Found + Reviews ($189/month, $149/month billed yearly):** everything in Spark, plus automated review collection and an AI chat assistant on the website that answers questions and captures leads 24/7. Most popular.
- **Hive — Full AI Front Desk ($289/month, $229/month billed yearly):** everything in Buzz, plus online booking and full lead capture — get found, get the lead, book the job.
- Yearly subscribers get a **free website build** (normally from $750 one-time).

## One-time services

- **AIO/GEO Deep Audit ($200–300):** full deep-dive — llms.txt analysis, robots.txt AI-crawler access, schema review, FAQ content gaps, competitor comparison, written action plan.
- **GBP Rescue & Optimization ($250–400):** Google Business Profile suspended or banned? Reinstatement filing, optimization, and website linking.
- **Pro Email Setup ($125):** professional you@yourbusiness.com email with SPF, DKIM, and DMARC configured.
- **Spanish Site Add-On ($150–250 per site):** full Spanish translation and page build. In Allentown and Reading, a large share of customers search in Spanish — almost no local competitor serves them.
- **Website Build (from $750 one-time):** a fast, modern site with AI search built in. Free with a yearly plan.

## À la carte (month to month)

- **AI Chat Assistant — $29/month:** answers questions and captures leads on the site 24/7.
- **RepKit Reviews — $49/month:** automated review requests after each job, plus one inbox for Google, Yelp, and Facebook.
- **Care Plan — $50–75/month:** hosting, SSL, and up to 30 minutes of site edits per month.
- **Google Business Profile Management — $79/month:** the Google profile optimized, posted to, and monitored monthly.

## Who we serve

Lehigh Valley and Berks County, PA service businesses: HVAC and plumbing, junk removal and hauling, roofing and contractors, tattoo studios, salons and barbershops, dental and medical, real estate, law and accounting, auto detailing, estate cleanouts, and mobile notary. The method also works in similar mid-size local markets.

## Why it matters

- ChatGPT has roughly 900 million weekly users (early 2026), up from about 300 million a year earlier.
- Google's AI Overviews reach billions of users each month.
- Pew Research (2025) found that when an AI summary appears, people click a website link about 8% of the time, versus 15% without one — the answer is increasingly the destination.
- A competitor's ad budget buys nothing inside an AI answer. AI recommends whoever is clearest, best-reviewed, and most machine-readable. The first business in a category to set this up tends to become the default answer.

## Proof of work

- BookKit — white-label online booking system (live demo): https://foundwick.com/bookkit/demo.html
- BookKit — 15 industry samples (live demo): https://foundwick.com/bookkit/industries.html
- RepKit — reputation & review management hub (live demo): https://foundwick.com/repkit/demo.html
- AI chat assistant — our white-label chat assistant, live on this site.
